## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (typecheck + compile)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it made sense (no network / model downloads in tests)
- [ ] Logging goes to stderr, not stdout
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
